summary: Hydrated preflight shows all three original cluster issues are already closed. #60265 remains the historical canonical for the narrow local gateway sessions_spawn 1008 pairing failure, #59702 is a closed duplicate companion, #60929 is a closed related configuration case, and linked #69066 should stay open as a broader service-identity RFC. No close, merge, or fix action is planned.

actions.reason: Already closed; classify as duplicate of the historical canonical #60265 and take no mutation.
Historical canonical is already closed; no open duplicate target remains to close against it.
Already closed and meaningfully different in root cause; keep as related historical context only.
Related follow-up RFC with distinct broader scope; keep open and do not create a broad autonomous fix artifact.
